mapper.sql: id, biz_type, biz_object_id, flow_status, flow_type, flow_content, flow_json, executor_host, executor_port, version, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kettle_flow_repository ( id, biz_type, biz_object_id, flow_status, flow_type, flow_content, flow_json, executor_host, executor_port, version, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{bizType}, #{bizObjectId}, #{flowStatus}, #{flowType}, #{flowContent}, #{flowJson}, #{executorHost}, #{executorPort}, #{version}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE kettle_flow_repository SET executor_host = #{hostName}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_object_id = #{bizObjectId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kettle_flow_repository WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_object_id = #{bizObjectId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kettle_flow_repository WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_object_id = #{bizObjectId} ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM kettle_flow_repository WHERE executor_host = #{hostName} ORDER BY updated_time DESC
